action.reasoning: Observation: uniform 9-member ConvNeXt ensemble remains best at 0.7668; validation-tuned weighting/prior and CLIP diversity overfit or hurt hidden test. Analysis: identical-recipe seed ensembling gave the only robust hidden-test improvement so far, and the 9-member model is still far below the 1B parameter limit. Although gains are diminishing, adding more independent strong ConvNeXt seeds is safer than further validation-calibrated tricks. Decision: train eight additional 3-epoch ConvNeXt seeds with the validated recipe, append them to the current best ensemble9 checkpoint, and submit the larger uniform ensemble for evaluation.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 3 --seed 555 --out checkpoints/convnext_seed555_ep3.pt && python train.py --epochs 3 --seed 666 --out checkpoints/convnext_seed666_ep3.pt && python train.py --epochs 3 --seed 777 --out checkpoints/convnext_seed777_ep3.pt && python train.py --epochs 3 --seed 888 --out checkpoints/convnext_seed888_ep3.pt && python train.py --epochs 3 --seed 1111 --out checkpoints/convnext_seed1111_ep3.pt && python train.py --epochs 3 --seed 2222 --out checkpoints/convnext_seed2222_ep3.pt && python train.py --epochs 3 --seed 3333 --out checkpoints/convnext_seed3333_ep3.pt && python train.py --epochs 3 --seed 4444 --out checkpoints/convnext_seed4444_ep3.pt && python add_members.py --base checkpoints/ensemble9_ep3.pt --extras checkpoints/convnext_seed555_ep3.pt checkpoints/convnext_seed666_ep3.pt checkpoints/convnext_seed777_ep3.pt checkpoints/convnext_seed888_ep3.pt checkpoints/convnext_seed1111_ep3.pt checkpoints/convnext_seed2222_ep3.pt checkpoints/convnext_seed3333_ep3.pt checkpoints/convnext_seed4444_ep3.pt --out checkpoints/ensemble17_ep3.pt
